svg.title: SmartSleeve SS layered editable banner without green rails
svg.desc: Layered Inkscape-friendly SVG with movable SS semiconductor mark, SmartSleeve wordmark without horizontal green lines, and editable slogan text.

g.inkscape:label: SS semiconductor mark - move this layer
SmartSleeve wordmark only - move this layer
Editable slogan text - move/edit this layer

text.font-family: Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif

g.text: Quantitative trading for the agentic age.
